implementation: Accedo designed a bespoke application interface for an entertainment hub with a simplistic style, supported by a robust quality assurance team to deliver an exceptional mobile app [1].
Collaborated on digital product development to launch a healthcare and digital insurance hybrid app specifically tailored to the local Asian market [2].
Completely redesigned the Freeview app to enhance the usability of their HbbTV product and refine content discovery mechanisms for Australian free-to-air channels [3].
Acted as the front-end lead in UX and UI to develop a fresh, updated interface for the merger of the Lightbox platform with Neon, and provided ongoing product growth support [4].
Conducted extensive research to identify and streamline journeys, creating a seamless and intuitive app interface for fitness instructors to learn and teach classes [5].
Implemented UX recommendations across web, mobile, and Connected TV platforms to ensure seamless navigation, delivering a scalable solution to dynamically deploy new languages [6].
Designed, built, and tested a range of internet TV catch-up applications for international markets, including iOS, Android, and Foxtel set-top boxes [7].

Delivered flexible and robust solutions enhancing usability and engagement through a blend of QA, Engineering, and Design [8]. Additionally, resolved a CDN bandwidth bottleneck during the World Cup by increasing CSN capacity and redirecting users to offshore CDNs to avoid dropping customers [9].
Crafted an innovative app enabling digital fitness clubs to schedule and deliver immersive virtual classes without an instructor during off-peak hours [10].
Delivered Big Screen applications across multiple platforms (Samsung, LG, Panasonic, Android TV, etc.) featuring Live, On Demand, and Pay Per View capabilities for the 2019 Rugby World Cup [11].
Provided product and UX strategy for a crypto real estate platform through discovery workshops to ensure seamless, secure experiences for buyers and sellers [12].
Overhauled the primary e-commerce website to create a premium web discovery experience, which included UX strategy, UI design, customer data analysis, and developer handover [13].
Supported HP in delivering next-generation user and video experiences across key digital touch points to drive scalable innovation [14].
Built a bespoke framework solution to distribute multi-platform live streaming sports coverage across devices including Roku, HTML/JS platforms, gaming consoles, and Smart TVs [15].
Deployed a multi-device OTT service featuring highly performing and feature-rich applications for iPhone, iPad, and Apple TV [16].
Designed and implemented a free AVOD kids streaming service featuring unique parental controls, custom ad UI, and an innovative kid-safe TikTok vertical feed integration [17].
Redefined multi-brand user experiences across sports, entertainment, and news verticals, connecting users to video and information apps across popular devices [18].
Expanded the online education platform's reach to new CTV devices globally, delivering a consistent Quality of Experience and enhancing performance on low-end set-up-boxes [19].
Refreshed video streaming channels on Roku and other Connected Devices, while supporting Android development via a team augmentation model [20].
Upgraded streaming services with ad-supported and premium tiers for Olympics coverage, leveraging Google IMA and DAI for live and VOD pre-rolls and mid-rolls [21].
Expanded Smart TV presence on Samsung, LG, and Vizio utilizing agile development, UX design, backend support for purchase flows, QA testing, and post-launch maintenance [22].
Resolved a middleware logging system bottleneck during live event preparation, increasing RPM performance from 1.3K to 100K to handle expected World Cup traffic [23].
Investigated and provided an immediate quick fix for a service crash during live World Cup matches, followed by a permanent platform stabilization fix supporting up to 70 million users [24].
Provided a custom live event support and monitoring model with on-standby developers to ensure a smooth launch and avoid outages for VOD and 360-degree VR live concert streams [25].
